channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Justin Bieber & Nicki Minaj’s ‘Beauty and a Beat’ Hits No. 1 on Billboard Global Excl. U.S. Chart
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to the latest music update. We're taking a look at the Billboard Global Excl. U.S. chart, where Justin Bieber is making waves with his fans. Let's dive in."
[Upbeat music transitions]
Host: "Justin Bieber's 2012 hit 'Beauty and a Beat,' featuring Nicki Minaj, has jumped two places to No. 1 on the chart. This follows his high-profile performances at Coachella, where he wowed crowds with a hybrid set that included clips of his early hits played directly from YouTube."
[Short music clip of "Beauty and a Beat" plays]
Host: "The song gained an impressive 93% to 65.4 million streams outside the U.S. in just one week. This is Bieber's third No. 1 on the Global Excl. U.S. chart, and a first for Nicki Minaj."
[Music transitions]
Host: "But that's not all for Bieber. His songs 'Daisies' and 'Baby' have also seen a surge in popularity, with 'Daisies' returning to the top 10 and 'Baby' reaching a new high at No. 7. Bieber now has a total of 10 top 10s on the chart since it began."
[Short music clip of "Daisies" and "Baby" plays]
Host: "Other notable chart movements include Olivia Rodrigo's 'Drop Dead' debuting at No. 3, and BTS' 'Swim' slipping to No. 2. Tame Impala and JENNIE's 'Dracula' and Dominic Fike's 'Babydoll' also feature in the top 5."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for now. Thanks for tuning in to this music update. Remember to check out the Billboard Global Excl. U.S. chart for the latest music rankings from around the world."
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
